SORAMOD-TENSION_RISING_SORA_MOD.descript:
Damage is equal to your Drive.
Gain {Stars:diff()} Drive.

SORAMOD-FLASH_STEP_SORA_MOD.title: Flash Step
SORAMOD-SLAPSHOT_SORA_MOD.title: Slapshot
SORAMOD-RAGNAROK_SORA_MOD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} Damage to a random enemy X times.
Fire 1 additional time for every Drive you have.
SORAMOD-RAGNAROK_SORA_MOD.title: Ragnarok
SORAMOD-TRINITY_LIMIT_SORA_MOD.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} Damage to ALL enemies.
If you have 3 or more Drive, consume 3 Drive to play this card a second time.
SORAMOD-TRINITY_LIMIT_SORA_MOD.title: Trinity Limit

SORAMOD-GUARD_SORA_MOD.title: Guard
SORAMOD-DODGE_ROLL_SORA_MOD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
SORAMOD-DODGE_ROLL_SORA_MOD.title: Dodge Roll
SORAMOD-REACTION_COMMAND_SORA_MOD.descri:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next time you are attacked this turn, deal damage to the attacker equal to the [gold]Block[/gold] you lose.
SORAMOD-REACTION_COMMAND_SORA_MOD.title: Reaction Command

SORAMOD-VALOR_FORM_SORA_MOD.description:
Enter Valor Form!
Keyblade Cards Deal +2 Damage.
The First Attack Played Per Turn Costs 2 Less Energy.
Requires 3 Drive Gauge.
SORAMOD-VALOR_FORM_SORA_MOD.title: Valor Form
SORAMOD-WISDOM_FORM_SORA_MOD.description:
Enter Wisdom Form!
Magic Cards Give +2 Effect
Whenever You Play a [gold]Skill[/gold], Draw A Card
 Requires 3 Drive Gauge.
SORAMOD-WISDOM_FORM_SORA_MOD.title: Wisdom Form
